mapper.sql: id, `name`, code, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.insert: insert into product_spec (`name`, code, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values (#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER})

`name`,
code,
create_time,
create_by,
update_by,
update_time,
delete_flag,

mapper.update:
update product_spec
`name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update product_spec set `name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into product_spec (`name`, code, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values
(#{item.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER})
